Elements (Little Alchemy 1)

Sign In to Save Save Edit
  • History
  • Purge
  • Talk (0)
Elements
Little Alchemy 1 Little Alchemy 2
Myths and Monsters

There are a total of 589 elements in Little Alchemy (580 normal elements plus 9 hidden elements). Each element can be created by combining 2 other elements, except for the starting elements, which are unlocked from the start. Each of the tier of elements are harder to get since you have to have elements from all the other tiers.

The hidden gems do not give you a point in the bottom left because they are hidden.

FE = Final element

HG = Hidden gem

Contents

  • 1 List of elements
    • 1.1 Starting elements
    • 1.2 Tier 1 elements
    • 1.3 Tier 2 elements
    • 1.4 Tier 3 elements
    • 1.5 Tier 4 elements
    • 1.6 Tier 5 elements
    • 1.7 Tier 6 elements
    • 1.8 Tier 7 elements
    • 1.9 Tier 8 elements
    • 1.10 Tier 9 elements
    • 1.11 Tier 10 elements
    • 1.12 Tier 11 elements
    • 1.13 Tier 12 elements
    • 1.14 Tier 13 elements

List of elements[]

Starting elements[]

These elements are the basic that available from the start.

Element Recipes
Air Available from the start
Earth Available from the start
Fire Available from the start
Water Available from the start
  • Fire + Ice

Tier 1 elements[]

These elements can be created by combining only the starting elements.

Element Recipes
Dust
  • Earth + Air
  • Sun + Vampire
  • Day + Vampire
Energy
  • Air + Fire
  • Plant + Sun
Lava
  • Earth + Fire
Mud
  • Water + Earth
Pressure
  • Earth + Earth
  • Air + Air
Rain
  • Water + Air
  • Cloud + Water
Sea
  • Water + Water
Steam
  • Water + Fire
  • Water + Energy
